title: Escape from Impel Down
main_description: The breakout erupts as Blackbeard enters the prison and Luffy heads for Marineford. The chapter mainly follows Magellan, Whitebeard, Luffy, Franky, keeping the focus on the Impel Down storyline.
key_events: Escape from Impel Down: Rising Conflict
Escape from Impel Down: Key Exchange
Escape from Impel Down: Turning Point
